headline: Anthropic warns of stock scams as Claude adoption accelerates healthcare
body: Anthropic issued an urgent warning about unauthorized stock sales and investment scams targeting the company, with fraudsters using secondary platforms to impersonate legitimate share offerings. The alert comes as Anthropic expands Claude's capabilities into specialized domains, including new lawyer tools positioned as transformative for legal workflows. For healthcare AI implementations, this serves as a critical reminder that vendor security and legitimacy matter when evaluating Claude for sensitive applications like clinical documentation or compliance workflows. Healthcare organizations considering Anthropic partnerships should verify all communications directly through official channels and be cautious of unofficial investment or access claims. The incident underscores the importance of vendor due diligence as AI tools integrate deeper into regulated healthcare operations.
